content_fingerprint: hugging face gradio spaces now auto generate machine readable agent endpoints every gradio space on hugging face now automatically exposes an agents endpoint allowing ai coding agents to discover and interact with the space without manual configuration or wrapper code hugging face has updated its gradio platform so that every gradio space now automatically serves an agents endpoint at runtime this endpoint provides a structured machine readable api description that any compatible ai agent can parse and call directly eliminating the need for developers to write custom integration code or docume
